texto: Carezza, like Tantra, considers the sex act to be a true feast of love, and ejaculation is seen as a clumsy, crude incident-something quite banal which kills sexual desire. The man who, a few minutes before was seized by a frantic sexual desire, changes as soon as he has ejaculated and turns away from his wife, damaging her in her self-respect and her love as well.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a André Van Lysebeth: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Carezza, like Tantra, considers the sex act to be a true feast of love, and ejaculation is seen a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, initiation, relationships pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e relationships.
